visual_description: A medium close-up shot focuses on a man in a light blue, button-down shirt sitting at a desk in what appears to be an office. In the blurred background, another man in a similar shirt is visible, also at a desk. The setting is dimly lit with a cool, blueish color tone. On the left side of the screen, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The main subject is initially looking down, then brings a small, white disposable cup to his lips and takes a sip. The audio features a man speaking in a calm and matter-of-fact tone. He begins with a brief, slightly weary-sounding "谢了" (xiè le), which translates to "Thanks." After a moment, he lowers the cup and looks down again, resuming his work. Following a soft, rustling sound, as if someone is handling a small object, he speaks again with a direct and slightly hurried tone, saying, "对了" (duì le), meaning "By the way." The camera remains steady throughout the clip, maintaining its focus on the man in the foreground. The background is quiet, with no music, allowing the focus to remain on the man's voice and the subtle ambient sounds of
